---
title: My dynamic report
output: html_fragment
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE)

library(tidyverse)

logged_data <- read_csv("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vRLksYSJijyWXufV9fSMFjS1nBm3dY2X_mNJLrl_S9WXgEeQsKMdfwecs2VB7RkLgTfDALdMxNucqrN/pub?output=csv")
```

## Phone Usage Analysis

The average phone usage is `r mean(logged_data[[2]])` minutes.

The maximum phone usage is `r max(logged_data[[2]])` minutes.

```{r}
ggplot(logged_data, aes(x = logged_data[[3]])) +
  geom_bar()
```

```{r}
ggplot(logged_data, aes(x = logged_data[[4]])) +
  geom_bar()
```
